item.description:
Fixes

  • use global git config in bump-cask release job
  • remove unsupported versioning-strategy for Swift
  • correctness and perf across content, detail, and services
  • harden CommandRunner and service state handling
  • export coverage from Brewy.debug.dylib, not the launcher stub

Under the Hood

  • remove bump-cask job in favor of Homebrew autobump

Documentation

  • refresh CLAUDE.md after model, view, CI, and test changes

Testing

  • add real-subprocess tests for CommandRunner
  • skip Process Execution suite on GitHub Actions
